concept: Bright / Giving Off Much Light / Vivid
description: Giving off or reflecting much light; vivid and bold. 'Keru' names simple, strong light—the quality of clear illumination, colors that stand out, visibility without shadow.
sound_symbolism: The word strikes with clarity. 'Ke' begins with crisp contact, light appearing. Then 'ru' radiates strongly, brightness filling space.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'keru silero' (bright star). Simpler and stronger than 'pholuo' (luminous)—direct light rather than gentle glow.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Bright futures are possible futures—light as metaphor for hope, clarity, and positive vision.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Bright awareness sees clearly—the quality of mind that perceives without distortion.
